name: Ironveil Sentinel
description: Frontline defender with Taunt and Divine Shield.
flavor_text: They don't break armor. They become it.

name: Shieldbreaker Maul
description: Battlecry: Destroy an enemy minion with 3 or less Attack.
flavor_text: It doesn't matter how many shields you have-I've seen them all crack.

name: Aegis of the Wall
description: Whenever you take damage, gain a 2/2 Shield with Taunt.
flavor_text: The wall doesn't stop the storm-it becomes the storm's prison.

name: Retributive Chain
description: Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If it dies, deal 4 damage to all other enemies.
flavor_text: One strike. One death. The rest? Just collateral.

name: The Iron Oath
description: Taunt. Enrage: Gain +2/+2 and Lifesteal.
flavor_text: They said I was dead. I was just waiting for them to get close enough to hate me.

name: Dustfoot Stalker
description: Stealth early-game threat.
flavor_text: They say the wind doesn't leave footprints-until it's time to strike.

name: Galewing Trap
description: Set a trap. When an enemy attacks a non-stealth minion, it gets frozen and takes 3 damage.
flavor_text: You think you're hunting? You just walked into my windstorm.

name: Skydancer Blade
description: Windfury and Stealth for explosive turns.
flavor_text: A blade that moves faster than the eye can follow is the only thing the wind fears.

name: Arrowstorm Volley
description: Deal 1 damage to all enemy minions. If any die, deal 3 more damage to the enemy hero.
flavor_text: One arrow misses. A hundred arrows... become the sky.

name: Whisperwind, the Unseen Path
description: Stealth. Combo: Gain +4/+4 and Windfury.
flavor_text: They never saw me coming. They didn't even know I was gone.

name: Bone Revenant
description: Deathrattle: Summon a 1/1 Skeleton.
flavor_text: They don't rise because they want to - they rise because you ordered it.

name: Soul Drain
description: Deal 2 damage to a creature. Gain 2 life.
flavor_text: Every breath taken from the fallen feeds the grave's hunger.

name: Carrion Wurm
description: Lifesteal and Taunt.
flavor_text: It doesn't eat the dead - it becomes them.

name: Grave Pact
description: Whenever a creature dies, each player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
flavor_text: The graveyard is not an end - it is a ledger, and you are the accountant.

name: Lich King's Ascension
description: When played, sacrifice all creatures you control. Then, return all creatures that died this game to the battlefield under your control.
flavor_text: Death is not the final chapter. It is the prologue to your reign.

name: Sproutling
description: Battlecry: Gain +1 Health for each other friendly creature.
flavor_text: Even the smallest seed knows when to grow.

name: Healing Bloom
description: Restore 3 Health to all friendly characters.
flavor_text: The earth remembers every wound - and heals it in time.

name: Ancient Treant
description: Taunt, Lifesteal, Enrage: Gain +2 Attack when damaged.
flavor_text: It has stood since the first rain. It will stand long after the last fire.

name: Rampant Growth
description: Gain 2 Mana Crystals this turn only. (Max 10.)
flavor_text: The forest does not rush - it grows, and the world makes room for it.

name: World Tree's Embrace
description: At the start of your turn, gain a random Life card from your deck. All friendly creatures gain +2/+2 and Immune to Poison.
flavor_text: The roots hold the world. The leaves breathe life. The heart beats on.

name: Shadow Dagger
description: Deal 2 damage. If you played another card this turn, deal 2 additional damage.
flavor_text: A blade only kills when unseen.

name: Ghoststep
description: Summon a 0/1 Phantom with Stealth. If you played another card this turn, it gains +2 Attack.
flavor_text: They say the wind forgets the thief. They're wrong-it remembers every breath.

name: Deceptive Draw
description: Draw a card. If you played another card this turn, draw two more and discard one.
flavor_text: You don't need more cards-you need the right ones.

name: Whispering Knife
description: Deathrattle: Destroy a random enemy card in hand. If you played another card this turn, destroy two.
flavor_text: The last thing your opponent sees is the glint... then nothing.

name: Mirage Gambit
description: Deal 4 damage to all enemy minions. If you played another card this turn, also deal 4 damage to the enemy hero and shuffle two 1/1 Phantoms into your deck.
flavor_text: The illusion isn't in the attack-it's in the timing.

name: Gearcore Battery
description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 mana. Next turn, you cannot spend mana.
flavor_text: It hums with potential-and the cost of that potential is silence.

name: Turret Bot
description: Charge. Next turn, you cannot cast spells.
flavor_text: It doesn't think. It doesn't feel. It just fires.

name: Repair Drone
description: Battlecry: Restore 2 health to a friendly artifact. Next turn, gain 1 less mana.
flavor_text: It fixes what's broken... but never asks what's next.

name: Clockwork Colossus
description: Taunt. At the start of your turn, gain 2 Attack. Next turn, you cannot play cards.
flavor_text: It walks with the weight of ten gears and the silence of ten engines.

name: Anvil Forge
description: At the start of your turn, create a 1/1 Gearling. Next turn, all your artifacts gain +2 Attack.
flavor_text: It doesn't build machines. It builds inevitability.
